Received: <element(s) not found>

TimeoutError: locator.toContainText: Timeout 5000ms exceeded. waiting for getByTestId('logged-in-as') at demo/landing/tests/login.spec.ts:8:50 - locator resolved to 0 elements after form submission Network trace (last 5s before failure): POST /api/login → 200 OK GET /api/session → 200 OK { "userId": "alice-123", "requiresOnboarding": true } GET /onboarding → 200 OK (redirected here instead of /dashboard) DOM snapshot at failure (current URL: /onboarding):

Observation: the user authenticated successfully (200 from /api/login) but the session endpoint returned requiresOnboarding=true, redirecting to /onboarding instead of /dashboard. The login itself worked; the test's assumption about post-login navigation no longer holds.
